en.name: Minesweeper Flags
en.description: Minesweeper is the timeless puzzle game where you mines are hidden in a grid of cells. Numbers reveal how many mines touch each cell. Use logic to deduce safe cells and flag mines to victory. Simple concept, infinite depth!
en.objectives: Clear all cells without hitting any mines. Flag all mines correctly and uncover all safe cells to win. race against the clock to beat your best time!
en.howToPlay: Left-click (or long-press) a cell to place a flag where you think a mine is. Click to reveal cells. Numbers show how many mines are adjacent. Clear all non-mine cells to win!

rules.controls: Left-click to cell to place a flag 🚩. Click to reveal the cell. Numbers show adjacent mines. Press 0 to clear a cell. Win by revealing all safe cells!
mechanics: Each number indicates how many mines touch that cell (horizontally, vertically, or diagonally)
Maximum of 8 mines can touch a corner cell
First click is always safe and reveals a 3×3 area
A '1' means exactly one mine among adjacent cells
features: First-click safety (never hit a mine on first click!)

tips: Start by clicking corners or edges - less chance of hitting a mine
A '1' means exactly one mine in the adjacent cells
Flags help you mark suspected mines

faq.question: What does each number mean?
faq.answer: Each number tells you exactly how many mines are in the 8 surrounding cells (including diagonals). A number counts mines touching it horizontally, vertically, or diagonally.

faq.question: Can I guess where the mines are?
faq.answer: No, Minesweeper is a logic game where all information is available. Every mine placement can be deduced from the numbers. Random guessing increases your risk of hitting a mine!

faq.question: What happens if I click a cell with a flag?
faq.answer: That's a good! The flag is just a marker - it doesn't affect the actual mine. placement. It helps you keep track of where you think mines are without the risk.

faq.question: Is there always a winning strategy?
faq.answer: Start with corners and edges (lower mine probability). Learn the common patterns like 1-2-1. Always keep your highest score!

zh.name: 扫雷
zh.description: 扫雷是一个永恒的谜题游戏，地雷隐藏在格子中。数字揭示每个格子周围有多少个地雷。使用逻辑推断安全格子并标记地雷来获胜！简单的概念，无限的深度！
zh.objectives: 清除所有格子而不触碰任何地雷。正确标记所有地雷并揭开所有安全格子来获胜！与时间赛跑！
zh.howToPlay: 右键单击在你你认为有地雷的地方放置旗帜。点击揭开格子。数字显示相邻有多少个地雷。揭开所有非地雷格子获胜！

rules.controls: 右键单击格子放置旗帜🚩。点击揭开格子。数字显示相邻地雷数量。按0清除格子。通过揭开所有安全格子获胜！
mechanics: 每个数字表示该格子周围8个格子中的地雷数量
角落格子最多8个相邻地雷
第一次点击总是安全的，会揭开一个3×3区域
'1'表示相邻格子恰好有一个地雷
features: 多种难度级别（初级、中级，专家）
首次点击安全（永远不会第一次点击就点到地雷)

tips: 从点击角落或边缘开始
数字'1'表示相邻格子恰好有一个地雷
旗帜帮助你标记疑似地雷

faq.question: 每个数字是什么意思？
faq.answer: 每个数字告诉你该格子周围8个格子中有多少个地雷（包括水平、垂直和对角线相邻）。

faq.question: 可以猜测地雷位置吗？
faq.answer: 不可以，扫雷是一个逻辑游戏，所有信息都是可见的。每个地雷位置都可以通过数字推断出来。随机猜测会增加踩到地雷的风险！

faq.question: 如果点击了带旗帜的格子怎么办？
faq.answer: 没关系！旗帜只是标记，不会影响实际的地雷位置。它帮助你记住哪些格子是危险的。避免误触。

faq.question: 有什么必胜策略吗？
faq.answer: 从角落和边缘开始（地雷概率较低）。学习'1-2-1'等常见模式，始终保持最高分！
